ab: adu ilumah a hudaspingaz i?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: isian asasabahan a saia masabah
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: adu ilumah a hudaspingaz i?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: uka, laupang a saia kaunata nasanavanin minsuma
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: adu ilumah a hudasnanaz i?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: isian a saia dusalautu, kaudadazaa kilim mas saicia.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: adu aiza a bunun ilumah i?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Banitul hangsia, malbuntu’in nii tu mapasadu mas suu, malsialsialangas aupa i?
ch: B:是Banitul阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Banitul. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: malsialang, kilimiksu mahaling
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: isa a isuu tama i?
en: Where is your father?

ab: isian pipit’ia’an a saia makaling mas pandian, kaudiipik malala mas saicia.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: kau’isa a Ibu i?
en: Where did Ibu go?

ab: kausian pattulkukan a saia madamu mas tulkuk
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: hudasnanaz, minsuma’in a kaimin
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: uka ilumah a imuu hudasnanaz, isian huma a saia, ilumaha a kamu maltatala mas saicia
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: minsuma’inas pantamaun
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: malbuntu’in nii tu mapasadu, tallauskavin a kasu
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: manaskal tu sadusu tu minsuma
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: maza sain hai paimuu tu bunglai, pusianav piskakazavan
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: malbuntu’in nii tu minsuma, taudanivunku amin tu muskuna maun mas haising
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: masu, nakaaz a saikin huud mas savil, kausianta bukzavan mahalinga
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: uninang mas isuu tu sinpulaung namusuhisin a saikin
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: laupang a andiip tulkukan patazun, adasavsu ikdaukdauk
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
